Seo.title: Frontend Team Lead | Join RW Infotech’s Web Development Team
Seo.description: Join RW Infotech as a Frontend Team Lead and drive high-impact web development projects. Lead a talented team, craft user-centric interfaces, and shape digital experiences.

content.text: 2 years
Job Summary:

We are seeking a Frontend Team Lead with strong technical expertise and leadership capabilities to manage and mentor a team of frontend developers. The ideal candidate will take complete ownership of project execution, guide the team in adopting best development practices, and act as the key point of contact between technical and non-technical stakeholders. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about code quality, architecture, and team collaboration.
What We Are Looking For:
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in frontend development.
Proven experience in leading or mentoring a team of developers.
Expertise in core technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript.
Strong experience in frontend frameworks like React.js, Angular, or Vue.js.
Proficiency in version control tools such as Git/GitHub.
Strong grasp of frontend architecture, performance optimization, and responsive design.
Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making skills.
Ability to independently manage a team and ensure timely project delivery.
Strong communication skills and the ability to work cross-functionally.
What You Will Be Doing:
Lead and manage a team of frontend developers across multiple live projects.
Allocate tasks, monitor progress, and ensure high-quality code delivery within deadlines.
Guide the team in code reviews, architectural decisions, and best practices.
Collaborate with management, product, and backend teams for smooth project execution.
Troubleshoot technical issues, resolve blockers, and improve development workflows.
Drive performance improvements, maintain project documentation, and set development standards.
Support and mentor junior developers to upskill and grow within the team.
The Application Process:
Step 1:
Submit your updated resume with relevant project links or GitHub (if available).
Step 2:
Appear for a technical assessment to evaluate coding proficiency and architectural thinking.
Step 3:
Attend an interview to assess leadership ability, communication, and technical problem-solving.
Step 4:
If selected, receive the offer and start leading challenging and rewarding projects with our team.
Weekly: 5 days

content.Title: Frontend Team Lead
content.Description: We are seeking a Frontend Team Lead with strong technical expertise and leadership capabilities to manage and mentor a team of frontend developers. The ideal candidate will take complete ownership of project execution, guide the team in adopting best development practices, and act as the key point of contact between technical and non-technical stakeholders. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about code quality, architecture, and team collaboration.

Seo.title: UI/UX Designer | Design Engaging User Experiences at RW Infotech
Seo.description: Join RW Infotech as a UI/UX Designer to create intuitive, user-focused designs for web and mobile. Collaborate with teams and shape seamless digital experiences.

content.text: 1 to 1.5 years of experience
Job Summary:

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with 1 to 1.5 years of professional experience to join our growing design team. The ideal candidate should be passionate about user-centric design, have hands-on experience with UI/UX tools, and a strong understanding of design principles. You will be working on live web and mobile-based projects and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver intuitive and visually appealing user experiences.
What We Are Looking For:
1 to 1.5 years of experience in UI/UX design (agency or in-house).
Proficiency in tools like Figma, Adobe XD, or Sketch.
Strong grasp of design principles, typography, color theory, and layout techniques.
Ability to create wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes.
Experience in conducting user research, competitive analysis, and improving user journeys.
Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with developers and stakeholders.
A well-structured portfolio showcasing your design projects and process is mandatory.
What You Will Be Doing:
Designing responsive UI for web and mobile applications based on user and business requirements.
Collaborating with development teams to ensure smooth handoff and implementation.
Participating in user research, usability testing, and feedback sessions.
Creating wireframes, user flows, high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototypes.
Improving and maintaining design consistency across products using design systems.
Participating in brainstorming and design review meetings.
The Application Process:
Step 1:
Submit your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant UI/UX work.
Step 2:
Complete a design assessment to evaluate your creative and problem-solving skills.
Step 3:
Attend an interview to discuss your design approach, experience, and team fit.
Step 4:
If selected, receive an offer and start working on exciting live projects with our team.
Weekly: 5 days

content.Title: UI/UX Designer
content.Description: We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with 1 to 1.5 years of professional experience to join our growing design team. The ideal candidate should be passionate about user-centric design, have hands-on experience with UI/UX tools, and a strong understanding of design principles. You will be working on live web and mobile-based projects and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver intuitive and visually appealing user experiences.

Seo.title: Project Coordinator | Manage Client Projects at RW Infotech
Seo.description: RW Infotech is hiring a Project Coordinator with 1.5–3 years of experience. Manage projects, coordinate teams, and ensure smooth client communication.

content.text: 1.5–3 years of experience
Job Summary:

We are seeking a Project Coordinator with 1.5–3 years of experience who can effectively manage project timelines, team coordination, and client communication. The ideal candidate should have a solid understanding of project coordination responsibilities, documentation (such as HRD, BRD, FRD), and hands-on experience with project management tools. This role is ideal for professionals who are organized, proactive, and capable of handling multiple IT service-based projects in a collaborative environment.
What We Are Looking For:
Proven experience in managing IT service-based projects (minimum 1.5 years).
In-depth understanding of documentation such as HRD, BRD, and FRD.
Experience with project management platforms like ClickUp, JIRA, Trello, or Asana.
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and other documentation tools.
Strong communication, organizational, and time-management skills.
Ability to handle multiple projects, meet deadlines, and coordinate with cross-functional teams.
What You Will Be Doing:
Coordinating across teams including developers, designers, QA, and clients.
Preparing and maintaining project documents (HRD, BRD, FRD, MoMs).
Tracking project progress using tools like
ClickUp, Trello, or JIRA
Managing project schedules, timelines, and resource allocations.
Organizing client meetings and ensuring timely follow-ups.
Supporting Project Managers with change requests, escalations, and scope control.
The Application Process:
Step 1:
Submit your updated resume (and project documentation samples, if available).
Step 2:
Appear for a technical evaluation on project coordination, documentation, and tools.
Step 3:
Attend a personal interview to assess your experience, communication, and team fit.
Step 4:
If selected, receive the offer and join the team to begin your journey with RW Infotech.
Weekly: 5 days

content.Title: Project Coordinator

Seo.title: Frontend Development Intern | Launch Your Dev Career at RW Infotech
Seo.description: Join RW Infotech as a Frontend Development Intern and build modern web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Apply now to grow your skills.

content.text: Fresher
Job Summary:
We are seeking a
Frontend Development Intern

who is passionate about web development and eager to gain hands-on experience in modern frontend technologies. The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frontend frameworks. This internship is an excellent opportunity for those who have completed a minimum 3-month frontend development course and are looking to apply their skills in a real-world environment. We prefer immediate joiners who are serious about this role, have a strong learning attitude, and are willing to grow in the field of frontend development.
What We Are Looking For:
Basic frontend concepts should be clear.
Completed at least a 3-month course in frontend development.
Strong skills in HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.
Experience with React and Next.js frameworks.
Knowledge of CMS platforms like Prismic, Storyblok, or similar.
A serious approach to the position with a strong willingness to learn and grow.
Immediate availability to join.
What You Will Be Doing:
Developing and styling responsive web pages using
HTML, CSS, SCSS, and Tailwind
Working with
JavaScript, React, and Next.js
to build dynamic and interactive
UIs.
Collaborating with the team to
implement modern UI/UX best practices.
Integrating
CMS platforms like Prismic or Storyblok
into frontend applications.
Troubleshooting and optimizing frontend performance for a better user experience.
Continuously learning and improving coding skills through real-time project work.
The Application Process:
Step 1:
Submit your updated resume and portfolio showcasing your projects.
Step 2:
Appear for a technical assessment to evaluate your knowledge and skills.
Step 3:
Attend an interview to discuss your experience, learning attitude, and passion for frontend development.
Step 4:
If selected, receive an offer and start your internship immediately.
Weekly: 5 days

content.Title: Frontend Development Intern

Seo.title: Business Development Executive | Grow Your Career at RW Infotech
Seo.description: RW Infotech is hiring a Business Development Executive to drive growth, build client relationships, and explore new market opportunities. Apply today!

content.text: BDE: 6 months to 1.5 years of Experience
Job Summary:

We are seeking a proactive and result-driven Business Development Executive (BDE - IT) who specializes in lead generation, outbound sales, LinkedIn outreach, email prospecting, and cold/hot calling. The ideal candidate should have excellent communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to work independently and meet sales targets. This role is an excellent opportunity for professionals looking to grow their career in IT sales and business development.
What We Are Looking For:
Strong understanding of lead generation strategies and sales processes.
Experience in LinkedIn outreach, email marketing, and cold/hot calling.
Excellent communication and negotiation skills to engage potential clients.
Proven ability to work independently and meet/exceed sales targets.
Prior experience in IT sales or B2B/B2C outbound sales is a plus.
Familiarity with CRM tools, sales automation, and reporting.
A goal-oriented approach with a strong drive for closing deals.
Immediate joiners are preferred.
What You Will Be Doing:
Conducting outbound calls, LinkedIn outreach, and email campaigns to generate new business leads.
Identifying and targeting potential clients for IT services and solutions.
Building strong relationships with decision-makers and stakeholders.
Managing and updating lead data in CRM tools for tracking and follow-ups.
Researching industry trends and staying up to date with IT market developments.
Working towards and achieving monthly and quarterly sales targets.
Coordinating with internal teams to ensure seamless client onboarding and service delivery.
Handling negotiations and closing deals effectively.
The Application Process:
Step 1:
Submit your updated resume along with details of your past sales experience, lead generation strategies, and achievements (if applicable).
Step 2:
Appear for a sales assessment to evaluate your lead generation, communication, and negotiation skills.
Step 3:
Attend an interview to discuss your experience, outbound sales expertise, LinkedIn/email outreach approach, and your ability to achieve sales targets.
Step 4:
If selected, receive an offer letter and kick-start your journey with us immediately.
Weekly: 5 days

content.Title: Business Development Executive

This role is an excellent opportunity for professionals looking to grow their career in IT sales and business development.
